title: TicketMessage
description: Raw inbound customer message from any channel (email, whatsapp, web_form)

id.description: Unique ticket identifier, e.g. TKT-001 or UUID

channel.description: Source channel — determines normalization, formatting, and response style

customer_email.description: Primary customer identifier. Required for email and web_form. May be null on first WhatsApp contact (phone-only).

customer_phone.description: E.164 phone number. Required for whatsapp channel. Null for email/web_form.

subject.description: Message subject. Present for email and web_form. Null for whatsapp (inferred from message body).

message.description: Raw message body. Never empty. Gibberish is valid; emptiness is not.

received_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of when the message was received

category.description: Pre-selected category from web form. Null for email and whatsapp.

metadata.description: Channel-specific metadata preserved for audit trail. Never null.

thread_id.description: Gmail thread ID for email channel

channel_message_id.description: External message ID: Gmail message ID, Twilio MessageSid, etc.

priority.description: Priority pre-selected on web form. Null for other channels.

oneOf.description: Email channel: email required, phone null
WhatsApp channel: phone required, email optional
Web form channel: email required, phone null
